title: iSDLC External Skills Manifest
description: Schema for external-skills-manifest.json. REQ-0022 FR-001, REQ-GH-253 FR-004 (bindings.sub_tasks additive field).

file.description: Relative path to the SKILL.md file

sourcePhase.description: Discovery phase that generated this skill

bindings.description: Binding configuration for when and how the skill is injected

phases.description: Workflow phases where this skill applies (or ['all'])

agents.description: Agent names where this skill applies (or ['all'])

sub_tasks.description: Background sub-task types this skill is relevant for (e.g., 'codebase-scan', 'blast-radius'). REQ-GH-253 FR-004, AC-004-03. Additive field — manifests without this field remain valid.

injection_mode.description: When to inject: always (every matching delegation) or on-demand (only when referenced)

delivery_type.description: How the skill content is delivered to the agent

tool_preferences.description: Tool routing preferences declared by this skill (REQ-GH-214)

tool_preferences_schema.description: Documentation schema for tool preference bindings
